ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2026 Continued To Aug-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-05-2026 Continued To Jul-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:28am and concluding at 9:39am.

Plaintiff starboard Commercial Brokage, Inc. appearing represented by Steve Bovarnick, Esq. via zoom.
Defendants Andrew Kong and Aliana Kong not appearing.

Court examines Sales Director and Custodian of Records for Plaintiff ROBERT MENENDEZ and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The court needs more information on this matter. The court is asking Mr. Bovarnick to file declaration from Raul Pulido with the lease agreement attached. This must be done at least 5 days prior to the next hearing.

This matter is coneinued to July 10, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Continued To Jun-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Starboard Commercial Brokage, Inc. appearing represented by Steven Howard Bovarnick, Esq., is present via zoom.
Defendants Andrew Kong and Aliana Kong are not appearing.

This department did not receive any courtesy copies prior to this days hearing.

This matter is continued to June 5, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to give Mr. Bovarnick an oppertunity to provide courtesty copies.
